name: agent-review
description: Review explicitly scoped code or selected Markdown content, including AI prompts and SKILL.md files.

interface.shortDescription: Review code, Markdown, prompts, and skills
interface.longDescription: Review explicitly scoped code in a clean worktree and progressively write report-only findings for correctness, reliability, security, performance, maintainability, architecture, comments, naming, language quality, and test infrastructure, including dependencies, setup, and configuration, while leaving formatting to repository formatters; or review selected Markdown content for correctness, clarity, structure, grammar, and consistency, with additional instruction-design, safety, metadata, and operational checks for prompts and skills, while redacting secrets and sensitive personal data from reports.
defaultPrompt: Use $review-code to review the whole repository.
Use $review-markdown to review the current README.md file in full.
